titleStmt.title: SII 11.186: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 186. (B.K. No. 238 of 1928-29.) MORAB, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE HANUMANTADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription, whose beginning is worn out, is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 28, Subhānu, Dīpāvaḷi-amavāse, Sunday, Vyatīpāta. In Subhānu, Dīpāvaḷi-amāvāsyā i.e., Āśvina-amāvāsyā ended on Saturday = A.D. 1103, October 3. Probably the gift was recorded on the next day. A grant of land appears to have been made. Mallikārjuna-Paṇḍita is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
verggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ Some lines in the beginning are completely worn out.
ttadiṁ pannirvva rggāvuṇḍu
mattarkkeyyaṁ biḍa śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakā lada 28 neya subhānusaṁ
vatsarada dīpāvaḷiyamavāse Ādivāramuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ yāgi
sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭa mattarondu baḷa goḷa
ḷiya paḷḷadiṁ paḍuva śvaradēvara keyyi Ā keyyiṁ paḍuva koṭṭar .
kūnajīyara saṁtati mallikārjjunapaṁḍitara sēna bōva
caluva grāmaṇigaḷu ma ko
ṇḍava rppātakar . Arasargge sēseyeṁ darasara kāṇike yendu dāyadharmmada teṟe yenda ruvaṇame ndupaṭaḷa
ṇiyanakke koṇḍava rccāṇḍāḷar . gaṁgāsāgara yamunā saṁgamatīrttha prayāge gaye yembī
ḷōtmakuḷa rdvijapuṁgavargge kuḷama naḷida rintida naḷidar . Ida nācaṁdrā rkkatāraṁbaraṁ
ditamāge pāḷipaṁ parama naḷide durātmaṁ narakagatige gaḷagaḷa
. sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāḷanīyōdbha vadbhiḥ sarbbāniyatān
pārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . madvaṁśajā®para mahīpativaṁ
pāpādapētamanasā bhuvi bhāvibhūpā yē pāḷayanti mama dharmmamidaṁ sama graṁ
viracitāṁjaḷirēśya mūrdhni . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundha rām ṣaṣṭi
rvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . śrīmatu sēnabōva nāgadēvaṇnana
sēnabōva Appaṇnayyana barehaṁ varddhamānavōjara besaṁ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 11.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
